parameters.responseBody:
DLH Pinterest OAuth Demo

This page proves the full OAuth flow + a real API call. If you're not connected yet, connect the Pinterest OAuth credential in n8n (Consent screen → Allow), then refresh this page.

Not connected.
Step 1: n8n → Credentials → Pinterest → Connect
Step 2: Pinterest consent screen → Allow access
Step 3: Come back here and refresh

={{ (() => { const u = $json || {}; const who = (u.username || u.id || '').toString(); const acct = (u.account_type || '').toString(); const esc = (s) => String(s ?? '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, (c) => ({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[c])); const req = $('OAuth Demo Page (GET)').first().json || {}; const currentUrl = String(req.url || ''); let publishUrl = 'oauth-demo/publish'; if (currentUrl) publishUrl = currentUrl.replace(/\/dlh\/pinterest\/oauth-demo\/?$/, '/dlh/pinterest/oauth-demo/publish'); return `Connected

Pinterest is connected

OAuth OK.
Account: ${esc(who || '(hidden)')}${acct ? `
Type: ${esc(acct)}` : ''}

Choose exactly one Pin (manual selection), then publish it via the API.


Tip: don’t show secrets/tokens in the recording.

`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const req = $('Publish Demo Pin (POST)').first().json || {}; const currentUrl = String(req.url || ''); let backUrl = 'oauth-demo'; if (currentUrl) backUrl = currentUrl.replace(/\/dlh\/pinterest\/oauth-demo\/publish\/?$/, '/dlh/pinterest/oauth-demo'); const esc = (s) => String(s ?? '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, (c) => ({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[c])); return `Not connected

Pinterest is not connected

Connect OAuth in n8n Credentials first, then go back.
Back
`; })() }}
